zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Elizabeth Wadham於1425年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易爾明斯特時，她的父親Sir John Wadham III24歲，母親Elizabeth Popham16歲。她和John Fauntleroy Esq至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Bartnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from Trøndelag, a form of Old Norse burkn ‘fern’ + nes ‘promontary, headland’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of German   Bartmess  .

variants.name: Bartmess
meanings: American shortened form of German   Barthelmess  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Elizabeth Wadham was born in 1425, in Ilminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Wadham III, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Popham, was 16. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with John Fauntleroy Esq. She died in 1510, in Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Elizabeth Wadham est née en 1425, à Ilminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wadham III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Popham, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec John Fauntleroy Esq. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Marsh, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Elizabeth Wadhamが1425年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトイルミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir John Wadham IIIは24歳，母Elizabeth Pophamは16歳であった。彼女はJohn Fauntleroy Esqとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスドールセトマーッシュで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Elizabeth Wadham(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wadham III(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Popham(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 John Fauntleroy Esq(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 마시에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Elizabeth Wadham родилась в 1425 г. в местности илминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Wadham III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Popham, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от John Fauntleroy Esq. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности марш, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
